To trigger the Docker image build, you need to either:

1. Manual trigger via GitHub Actions UI:
   - Go to: https://github.com/pbs-tech/homelab/actions/workflows/docker-build.yml
   - Click "Run workflow"
   - Select branch (main or develop)
   - Click "Run workflow"

2. Or push a change to the .github/docker/ directory:
   - Any change to .github/docker/Dockerfile.ci or Dockerfile.molecule
   - Will automatically trigger the build

3. Or wait for the weekly schedule:
   - Runs every Sunday at 2 AM UTC

Current image references in workflows:
- ghcr.io/pbs-tech/homelab-ci:latest
- ghcr.io/pbs-tech/homelab-molecule:latest

Note: Images are built and pushed to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io)
when the workflow runs on main/develop branches (not on PRs).
